IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (91635250.pdf)
SUMMARY: Knowledgeable Information Technology Specialist capable of setting up and optimizing workstations, training users and assisting with process improvement implementation in diverse areas. Familiar with Cisco business practices and IT standards.
SKILLS: Routers, Staff Management, Hardware Troubleshooting, Network Administration, Cisco, Help Desk Support, Cisco Switching, Cisco Routers, Hardware Installations, Learning Strategies, Software Updates, Repairing, System Testing Software, Operation Monitoring, Problem-Solving Skills, Excellent Interpersonal Skills, End-User Support, Advanced Computer Proficiency, Industry Needs Awareness, Contract Review Proficiency, Company Policy Adherence, Device Configuration, Hardware and Software Installation, Technical Support, Hardware Updates, Hardware and Software Problem Diagnosis, Security Protocols, Security Oversight, Speaking

SOURCE: 91635250.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Created new accounts, reset passwords and configured access to servers and file management software for users. Researched issues on various computer systems and databases to determine resolutions to problems and answer inquiries. Maintained records, logs and lifecycle documentation of work requests. Mentored other technologists and support professionals to provide professional development and skill enhancement.

SOURCE: 91635250.pdf
JOB TITLE: Computer Repair Technician
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Checked in computers and performed diagnostics for repair. Updated or installed software for customers to ensure computer efficiency.

SOURCE: 91635250.pdf
JOB TITLE: Correctional Officer
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Detected potential threats and quickly defused conflicts. Conducted internal security checks to ascertain inmate safety.
